issues.detail: The draft lists the notification date as "8 de maio de 2026 (2026-05-18)", incorrectly associating the deadline date with the event date.
References a supply contract dated 6 March 2025, which is not present in the case record.
Mentions citation costs of €641.36, which are not documented in the case record.
Agreement execution date stated as 16 January 2024 is not present in the case record.
Reference to Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 for period calculation is not supported by the case record.

The draft states "notificação de 18 de setembro de 2026 (2026-10-12)" implying the notification date is both 18 Sep 2026 and 12 Oct 2026; the latter is the computed deadline, not the notification date.
Draft states the agreement was executed on 04 October 2024, which is not present in the case record.
Draft cites Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 for the calculation, but the record does not reference this regulation.
Draft states it lacks lawyer review, but the case record provides no information to support this claim
Master Services Agreement execution date 12 March 2025 not present in record
Statement that Baltic Freight GmbH intends to proceed with renewal not supported by record
Reference to Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 not mentioned in record
Draft states it lacks lawyer review, but the case record does not contain any information about a review stamp.
The draft states it lacks lawyer review, but the case record does not contain any information about a review stamp or attorney verification.

Draft lists the notification date as "9 de outubro de 2026 (2026-11-09)" implying the notification occurred on 2026-11-09, which contradicts the record where the event date is 2026-10-09 and the computed deadline is 2026-11-09.
Draft cites article 138.º as the rule for counting days, but the record only specifies article 569.º as the legal basis; the reference to article 138.º is not supported by the provided record.
The draft includes a case reference "CASE-2025-195" which is not present in the provided case record.
Contract date 2 de agosto de 2025 not present in record
Reference to Regulation (CEE, Euratom) No 1182/71 not in record
Draft states the notification on 2026-05-18 relates to a 'projecto de decisão de indeferimento', which is not mentioned in the case record.
Draft cites a supply contract dated 26 de julho de 2025, which is not present in the case record.
The draft states the Master Services Agreement was executed on 01 July 2025, which is not present in the case record.
The draft claims Baltic Freight GmbH intends to proceed with renewal despite acknowledging a non‑renewal notice, a factual position not supported by the record.

Draft states the notification date as "11 de novembro de 2026 (2026-11-25)", conflating the event date with the computed deadline; the correct notification date is 2026-11-11 and the deadline is 2026-11-25.
